_comment: Pinned version + sha256 for each locked spec schema vendored from the wiki vault (ruth-pilot-b-wiki/_spec). `tripod check-drift` fails the build if a vendored file's hash no longer matches its pin, or (with --vault) if the wiki's canonical copy has drifted. Update only via a governed SPEC_CHANGES.md entry. See decision A + SPEC_CHANGES.md.
